# LayoutRow

One horizontal row of labels inside a `LayoutContainer`.

## Parameters

- `cols`: An array of strings. The [TextLabel](TextLabel.md)s in this row, laid out left to right. Their own `x`/`y` are ignored: the container positions them.
- `justify`: A string (see [Justify](Justify.md)). How this row is placed within the container's content width.
